question: What is polymorphism in Java?
options: Ability of an object to take many forms
Ability to inherit from multiple classes
correctAnswer: Ability of an object to take many forms

options: Creating multiple methods with same name

What is an abstract class?
options: A class that cannot be instantiated
A class with only static methods
A class with only private methods
correctAnswer: A class that cannot be instantiated

question: What is the purpose of the 'super' keyword?
options: To refer to parent class members
To refer to current class members
correctAnswer: To refer to parent class members

question: What is a constructor in Java?
options: A special method to initialize objects
correctAnswer: A special method to initialize objects
